summary: Tested ÜBER UNS Tab in Admin Dashboard and dynamic AboutPage content loading. Found and FIXED critical bug where ÜBER UNS save button was calling wrong API endpoint. PushOptInModal component verified to exist with proper integration.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: ÜBER UNS SPEICHERN button was calling saveHeroContent() which saves to /content/hero instead of /content/about
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added new saveAboutContent() function that transforms frontend data to backend format and calls /api/content/about endpoint

passed_tests: Admin ÜBER UNS Tab vorhanden - Tab exists in Admin Dashboard tabs list
Admin ÜBER UNS Tab bearbeitbar - All form fields are editable
Über uns: Geschichte (Titel, Text, Bild) bearbeitbar - TITEL, TEXT, BILD URL inputs exist and work
Über uns: Statistiken (4 Werte) bearbeitbar - 4 stat cards with number/label inputs
Über uns: Philosophie (3 Sektionen) bearbeitbar - 3 philosophy sections with title/description
Über uns: Zitat bearbeitbar - ZITAT TEXT and AUTOR fields exist
ÜBER UNS SPEICHERN button calls correct API endpoint - Now saves to /api/content/about
AboutPage lädt dynamische Inhalte aus Backend - data-testid='about-page' present, all dynamic content visible
AboutPage shows GEBOREN IN NEAPEL story title
AboutPage shows UNSERE PHILOSOPHIE with 3 sections
AboutPage shows quote section with text and author
Push Opt-In Modal Komponente existiert - PushOptInModal.jsx with proper data-testids
PushOptInModal integrated in OrderPage (after order success)
PushOptInModal integrated in ReservationPage (after reservation success)
critical_code_review_comments: All ÜBER UNS sections have proper editable fields
Statistics section correctly shows 4 editable stat cards
Philosophy section shows 3 editable philosophy items
AboutPage uses fallback default values if backend content not set

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are real

context_for_next_testing_agent: ÜBER UNS Tab in Admin Dashboard is fully functional. Fixed bug where save was calling wrong endpoint. AboutPage at /about route loads dynamic content from /api/content. PushOptInModal is integrated in CustomerAccountPage, OrderPage, and ReservationPage to show after registration/order/reservation completion.
